data.name: 筆下女友
data.detailed_description:
◆故事


我以為，我的日子除了不斷寫作之外別無其他，並將這樣默默無名地孤單度過一生。

然而某天早上，自稱是我小說作品女主角「蘿拉葛蕾絲」的人突然到訪，還要求住進我的家裡？！在一連串的問題之下我甚至找不到她不是本人的證據……我的平凡生活就在這個早晨出現了改變。

我們同居，甚至開始交流寫作的問題，在蘿拉的幫助下寫作的路也變得越來越順利，讓我離作家的夢想也越來越近。

眼看一切就要風生水起，但出現的一些詭異跡象讓我明白，事情不會這麼簡單，就算是天上掉下來的禮物也得付出代價，但……代價究竟是什麼？蘿拉出現的真正原因又是什麼？

蘿拉葛蕾絲，一個奇幻世界的女盜賊，她究竟會在我的人生中偷走什麼呢？

◆玩法


以第一人稱的方式，玩家將扮演平凡的作家黑田，透過文字劇情與增加感情的選項在奇妙的同居日常中挖掘逐漸露出的真相。
玩家的每一個決定，都將牽引著蘿拉與黑田的未來。

◆遊戲特色


◇17張基本CG，包含差分200張以上。
◇遊戲文字10萬字。
◇純愛劇情向遊戲。
◇遊戲結局：5種

data.short_description: 身為一個默默無名的專職作家，作品裡的女主角竟然活生生地出現在家門口，還要求一起同居生活？！在半推半就下，這個奇幻世界的女盜賊就這麼住進我家，在她的堅持下，我平凡又一成不變的生活開始出現了變化……但，她是為什麼出現的呢？這樣充滿未解之謎的生活又能維持多久？
data.supported_languages: 繁體中文, 英文, 德文, 泰文, 簡體中文, 越南文

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: WIN10/XP
  • 處理器: 1.2 GHz
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: DirectX 9 compatible graphics card
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0
  • 儲存空間: 512 MB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統 *: WIN10/XP
  • 處理器: 1.2 GHz
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: DirectX 9 compatible graphics card
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間

data.name: The Girlfriend From My Novel
data.detailed_description:
◆Story


I thought I would live my life in obscurity and loneliness, with nothing else to do but write.

Then one morning, someone claiming to be the heroine of my novel, Laura Grace, came to visit me and asked to stay in my house?! After a series of questions, I couldn't even find proof that she wasn't her... My ordinary life changed that morning.

We moved in together, we even started talking about writing, and with Laura's help, my writing process became smoother and smoother, bringing me closer to my dream of becoming a writer.

Things were cracking on nicely, but then some strange things happened, and I realized it was not simple. There was no such thing as free lunch, but…what was the price of this? And what was the real reason for Laura's appearance?

What would Laura Grace, a female burglar from a fantasy world, steal from my life?

◆Gameplay Instruction


In the first-person perspective, the player takes on the role of Kuroda, an obscure writer, and unearths the truth that gradually emerges through the textual drama and options of a fantastic daily life together.
Every decision the player makes will change the future of Laura and Kuroda.

◆Game Features


◇17 basic CGs, including more than 200 differentials
◇Game text: 100,000
◇Pure love drama
◇Game ending: 5 types

data.short_description: I was an obscure professional writer. A heroine of my work appeared in front of my house and asked to move in with me?! Half resisting, I let this female thief from a fantasy world live in my house. With her insistence, my ordinary, unchanging life began to change... But why did she appear?
data.supported_languages: Traditional Chinese, English, German, Thai, Simplified Chinese, Vietnamese
